Enterprise Positioning & Narrative

Messaging frameworks for CxO and procurement buyers across FinTech, Public Sector, Healthcare, and SMB verticals.

  • Defined SquadStack's positioning across all enterprise verticals

🤝

Sales Enablement & GTM

Assets that help sales navigate complex, multi-stakeholder deals from discovery to close.

  • Owned value props, differentiation strategy, and feature launch GTM
  • Battlecards, solution briefs, one-pagers, and decks with Sales
  • Demo scripts and walkthroughs for SMB and enterprise audiences
  • Customer success stories to shorten deal cycles
📊

Demand Generation & Conversion

Intent-led content and funnel thinking that builds pipeline with measurable results.

  • WhatsApp drip sequences: grew demo signups from 2 → 40/day
  • Closed deals scaled from 7 → 150/month via nurture flows
  • Conversion-optimised landing pages across key verticals
  • Lead nurturing flows improving trial activation rates
🔍

Competitive Intelligence & SEO

Staying sharp on the landscape to inform roadmap priorities and sharpen positioning.

  • Scaled organic traffic from 500 → 40,000+ monthly visitors
  • Keyword clustering and intent-led content programs
  • PR and external comms across long enterprise sales cycles

Brand Identity · Strategy · Telecrm
Rebranding

At Telecrm, we looked hard at ourselves and realised that we were unable to convey what we believed in, what we lived everyday. Our reason for going to office and staying back late, why work never felt like one.

We were all working for a mission, bigger than any of us. This rebrand was never about just a new logo or fresh colours.

It was about telling the world that we exist to bring about change — to transform the sour notion built around sales in India, and to redefine the kind of sales the world deserves. At the core of every little action and decision we make lies empathy.

We exist to serve, not just to sell.

Brand Visuals (Zoom in!)

Go Deeper

Central Brand Doc 📄 ↗Dhanda Dil Se 🎥 ↗New Logo Launch 🎥 ↗

👆 PS: This is months of work, and really close to the heart

Events · Lead Generation · 2025
Organising Convergence India 2025

It all started with me walking up to Rahul (CEO, Telecrm) and saying, “Let’s crash Convergence India 2025.”

He nodded. And just like that, Convergence India 2025 was on our plates. We had a tiny creative team of two — the main people who’d take the fall if anything went south. And the best part? None of us had done this ever before. But honestly? The hunger and excitement to make it work was far bigger than the fear of failure.

217
High-quality, high-intent leads
2
Person core team
0
Prior events experience

Booth Design

If you've ever organised an event for the first time, with resources more limited than the limits — you'd know what went behind making this happen on time. And how your eyes would still be stuck on “the missing floor lights.” But you cannot crib for long!

Assets

The booth was just the start. Then came the never-ending list of “small things” that no one tells you about but everyone notices if missing:

  • Diaries, pens, and brochures
  • Visiting cards
  • Branded bags and merchandise

But who knew one single colour will appear different in RGB, CMYK, matte, gloss and what not! Our timelines kept shrinking while problems kept growing.

Lead Capture Strategy

Now came the real question: How do we capture leads?

  • Designing QR flyers for lead collection
  • Linking them with UTM parameters
  • Creating a landing page to capture details

Because a booth is useless if people visit, smile, nod — and then walk away without leaving a trace.

Engagement App

We designed an app to help people navigate through the booth effortlessly, list their interests by company/tech category, and tick through once done!

The Outcome

All the late nights, tiny fires, and frantic last-minute fixes were worth it. People visited, scanned, engaged, and remembered us. We received a total of 217 high quality and high intent leads, ready to purchase — beyond all expectations!

Watch booth walkthrough 🎥 ↗LinkedIn Post 📋 ↗
